title: hicorius × nussbaumeri
intro: Hicorius × nussbaumeri, also known as the hybrid of Hicoria or shellbark hickory, is a tree species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. Its bark has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hicorius × nussbaumeri include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and combat infections, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. The herbal preparation of Hicorius × nussbaumeri typically involves drying the bark and using it as an infusion or decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
